TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Andrew_Anderson, title = Andrew_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Andrew_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Andrew Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, Andrew Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Andrew Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1945, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 7, Andrew Anderson, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: an*rew an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, an*rew an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
